page_0401.png: Edit Animations window showing Multi Pens Trend configuration with Options tab active — displays formatting, Fixed Time setting (5 Min), scale label position, grid line color, background color, and Default Trend Source set to Historian with Auto Detect enabled
page_0402.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing a multi-pen trend chart with three pens (Temperature in cyan, Level in green, Agitator in tan) plotted over a 5-minute window with legend table showing current values and axis ranges
page_0403.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window (alternate view) showing the same three-pen trend chart with Temperature (~116°C), Level (~99L), and Agitator (ON) values displayed in the pen legend table above the trend graph
page_0404_0.png: Tools toolbar in InTouch WindowMaker showing the element toolbox with drawing, text, and interactive controls — the Multi Pens Trend tool is visible at the bottom of the toolbar
page_0404_1.png: Edit Animations window with Trend Pens tab active — shows the first pen (Temperature) with blue color swatch and an empty second pen row (red swatch) ready for configuration
page_0405_0.png: Edit Animations window with Trend Pens tab — Temperature pen details showing Reference set to Me.Temperature.PV, Min/Max fields set to EngUnitsMin/EngUnitsMax, Units field set to Me.Temperature.PV.EngUnits, and Pen Options with blue color, weight 2, solid line, Step Line plot
page_0405_1.png: Temperature Details panel within Multi Pens Trend configuration — shows Auto Range unchecked with 10% margin, Min set to Me.Temperature.PV.EngUnitsMin, Max set to Me.Temperature.PV.EngUnitsMax, and Units field
page_0406_0.png: Temperature Details panel showing completed Min (Me.Temperature.PV.EngUnitsMin), Max (Me.Temperature.PV.EngUnitsMax), and Units (Me.Temperature.PV.EngUnits) fields, plus Pen Options section with blue color, weight 2, solid line pattern, and Step Line plot type
page_0406_1.png: Edit Animations window with Trend Pens tab — Temperature pen fully configured with Me.Temperature.PV reference, Min/Max/Units set to EngUnits properties, Plot type changed to Line, and an empty second pen row highlighted in red
page_0407.png: Edit Animations window with Trend Pens tab — Level pen configured with green color, Reference Me.Level.PV, Min set to Me.Level.PV.EngUnitsMin, Max to Me.Level.PV.EngUnitsMax, Units to Me.Level.PV.EngUnits, Plot set to Line
page_0408.png: Trend Pens table showing two configured pens (Temperature with blue swatch, Level with green swatch) and a third empty pen row ready for editing with Insert key prompt
page_0409.png: Edit Animations window with Trend Pens tab — Agitator pen configured with gray color, Reference Me.Agitator.PV, Min 0, Max 1, Pen Options with Step Line plot, and Source set to Historian with Auto Detect
page_0410.png: Edit Animations window with Options tab active — showing default settings: Fixed Time unchecked (5 Min), Scale Label Left Side, Trend Data Shown on Click unchecked, Grid Line Color gray, Background Color white, Default Trend Source set to Historian with Auto Detect checked
page_0411_0.png: Default Trend Source dialog showing Source radio buttons (Historian selected, InTouch Log History/LGH unselected), Historian section with Auto Detect checked and Server Name field grayed out
page_0411_1.png: WindowMaker canvas in design mode showing the MixingProcess_Detailed graphic with a duplicated Alarms button selected (blue handles) next to the original, with SA_Agitator_Settler tag label visible
page_0412_0.png: Edit Animations window for Trends_Btn button — Show Symbol interaction configured with Reference set to Me.TrendPopup, enabling the button to open the TrendPopup window at runtime
page_0412_1.png: $Mixer template canvas showing the complete process overview with Mixer panel containing Level and Temperature trend charts, connected equipment (pumps, valves, agitator), and Alarms/Trends navigation buttons in the top right
page_0413_0.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing three-pen trend chart with tooltip hover displaying Temperature (118.4731°C), Level (98.5384), and Agitator (1) values at a specific time point during a 5-minute window
page_0413_1.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing three-pen trend chart with pen legend, fixed 5-minute time window, and time controls — demonstrating live trend data with temperature, level, and agitator traces
page_0414_0.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window with right-click context menu open on the Temperature pen row showing Show/Hide/Add/Delete options for managing trend pens at runtime
page_0414_1.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing four pens after adding Inlet1 at runtime — Temperature, Level, Agitator, and Inlet1 (cyan) with the new pen's Reference set to Mixer100.Inlet1.LSOpen and Auto Range checked
page_0415_0.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing the time period dropdown expanded with options (1 Min, 5 Min, 10 Min, 15 Min, 30 Min, 1 Hour) — demonstrating how to change the trend time window at runtime
page_0415_1.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing trend chart after selecting 1 Min time period — displays a compressed 1-minute view with Temperature, Level, Agitator, and Inlet1 pens, demonstrating the in-memory caching issue where references don't update for a different mixer
page_0416.png: Mixer100.TrendPopup runtime window showing four-pen trend chart with Temperature (~107°C), Level (~11L), Agitator (OFF), and Inlet1 pens in a 1-minute fixed time window, illustrating the caching problem when switching between mixers
page_0417.png: AVEVA InTouch Configure backstage view showing the File menu with WindowViewer highlighted, used to access WindowViewer settings for disabling in-memory caching of Industrial Graphics
page_0418_0.png: WindowViewer settings dialog with Memory tab active — showing In-memory caching section with 'Cache Industrial Graphics not embedded in InTouch windows' checkbox (to be unchecked), memory limit settings, and high priority window caching options
page_0418_1.png: WindowMaker notification dialog confirming 'WindowViewer configuration successfully updated. It is necessary to restart WindowViewer for the changes to take effect.'
page_0422.png: TrendHistDisplay (Historian Client Trend control) showing a trend graph with multiple temperature tags from S01ENG server, date/time pickers for time range selection, tag picker panel on the left with analog and discrete tag filtering, and tag details panel at the bottom
